summary: Successfully completed comprehensive testing of Customer Management CRUD operations in Natural Plylam Admin Panel. All customer CRUD functionalities, search/filter features, UI components, and backend integration are working perfectly.
passed_tests: Admin login with admin@naturalplylam.com / admin123 credentials
Customer CRUD API endpoints (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
Customer list display with table showing name, contact, outstanding balance, tier, status
Search functionality - filter customers by name (tested with 'ABC Furniture')
Status filter buttons (All, Active, Pending, Inactive, Archived)
Add Customer form with slide-over panel
Customer form validation for required fields (name, contact person, email, phone)
Customer creation with success toast notification
Customer row click navigation to detail page
Customer detail page showing company info, contact details, recent orders, quick stats
Customer action dropdown menu (View Details, Edit, Deactivate, Archive, Delete)
Edit customer form with pre-filled data
Customer approve/reject actions for pending customers
Customer activate/deactivate toggle with confirm dialog
Customer archive functionality (soft delete)
Customer pagination and sorting (click column headers)
Dashboard KPI display (Awaiting Approval: 2, Total Orders: 5, Due Invoices: 0)
Toast notification system working correctly
ConfirmDialog component functioning properly
SlideOver component for add/edit forms
DataTable component with sorting and pagination
Backend API search and filtering (?search=Test, ?status=active)
Backend API pagination (?page=1&per_page=10)
Backend API sorting (?sort_by=name&sort_order=asc)
Customer creation via API with all fields
Customer update via API
Customer soft delete (archive) via API
Customer approval workflow via admin endpoints
